# **Product Brief**

**`Project Brief`** 

`We  are building a brand where:`

* **`Well-being becomes status`**  
   `Not visible wealth, but internal optimization`  
   `Not what you wear, but how you function`  
* **`Personalization becomes the new luxury`**  
   `Not mass-produced pills, but something only you can have`  
   `A positional good, redefined through biology`  
* **`AI becomes invisible but essential`**  
   `Not a feature`  
   `Not a gimmick`  
   `But the quiet intelligence that understands you better than you understand yourself`  
* **`The product becomes a reflection of identity`**  
   `“I built it” → “It’s mine” → “It’s superior”`  
   `Ownership becomes emotional, not transactional`  
* **`The experience becomes the product`**  
   `From onboarding → formulation → packaging → daily ritual`  
   `Every touchpoint reinforces: this was made for me`

### **`And at the center of it all:`**

**`Aissisted = AI + Assisted`**

`A new paradigm:`

`Not artificial replacing human`  
 `But intelligence assisting biology`  
 `Not automation`  
 `But augmentation`

`A system where:`

* `Your body provides the signal`  
* `Your data provides the language`  
* `Your AI provides the interpretation`  
* `Your product provides the outcome`

### **`Your tagline, decoded at a deeper level:`**

**`“Well-being is the new luxury (+ intelligent science the magic ingredient)”`**

`This is doing two critical jobs:`

1. **`Reframing luxury`**  
   * `From external → internal`  
   * `From ownership → optimization`  
   * `From status → self-mastery`  
2. **`Justifying the mechanism`**  
   * `AI is not cold technology`  
   * `It is the magic ingredient that unlocks personalization at scale`

`This aligns perfectly with where the market is going:`

* `Personalized nutrition growing at 14–17% CAGR`  
* `Online, subscription-based health becoming default behavior`  
* `Consumers demanding relevance, simplicity, and outcomes`

| `Section` | `What it actually defines` |
| :---- | :---- |
| `Vision & Mission` | `The future you’re creating` |
| `Opportunity` | `Why this moment exists` |
| `Industry Segmentation` | `Where the old world is broken` |
| `Consumer Insights` | `Why people are ready for this` |
| `Creative Brief` | `How we communicate the shift` |
| `Brand Guide` | `How it feels` |
| `Brand Architecture` | `How it scales` |
| `Messaging Hierarchy` | `How it speaks` |
| `Visual Guide` | `How it looks` |
| `Rally Cry` | `How it moves people` |
| `Reason to Believe` | `Why it’s real` |

### **`Most important: the throughline`**

`Everything must ladder back to one simple, undeniable truth:`

**`This was made for me.`**

`Not “for people like me.”`  
`Not “based on a quiz.”`  
`Not “recommended.”`

**`Made. For. Me.`**

`That is your moat.`  
`That is your luxury.`  
`That is your brand.`

## **`The Idea Beneath the Idea`**

`There was a time when luxury meant ownership.`

`A watch.`  
`A car.`  
`A label stitched into fabric.`

`Then the world changed.`

`Luxury became time.`  
`Then attention.`  
`Then access.`

`Now, it becomes something even more rare:`

**`Understanding.`**

`Not what the world sees about you.`  
`But what your body knows about you.`

## 

## 

## **`A New Model of Care`**

`Aissisted is born from a simple but profound shift:`

`We are no longer guessing at health.`  
`We are listening to it.`

`Not through instinct alone.`  
`Not through static formulas.`

`But through a conversation between:`

* `your biology`  
* `your data`  
* `and intelligence that can finally interpret both`

`Aissisted is not artificial intelligence.`

**`It is intelligence, assisting you.`**

`A quiet system that learns you.`  
`Refines you.`  
`Evolves with you.`

## **`The Core Belief`**

`The supplement industry was built on averages.`

`Average needs.`  
`Average doses.`  
`Average people.`

`But no one has ever been average.`

`And yet, everyone has been treated that way.`

`Aissisted rejects that entirely.`

`No two formulas should ever be the same.`  
`Because no two lives are the same.`

## **`The Shift: From Product to Possession`**

`You don’t buy Aissisted.`

`You build it.`

`You shape it through your:`

* `sleep`  
* `stress`  
* `movement`  
* `bloodwork`  
* `habits`  
* `evolution`

`And in doing so, something subtle but powerful happens:`

`You begin to feel ownership.`

`Not transactional ownership.`

`But something deeper.`

`“I built this.”`  
`“This is mine.”`  
`“This is me.”`

`This is the endowment effect, reimagined as identity.`

`And once something feels like you…`

`It becomes priceless.`

## **`The New Luxury`**

`Luxury is no longer about what others can see.`

`It is about what only you can feel.`

`Energy that lasts longer.`  
 `Sleep that goes deeper.`  
 `Clarity that sharpens.`  
 `A body that responds.`

`And most importantly:`

**`A system that understands you in a way nothing else does.`**

`That is the new luxury.`

`And personalization is how you access it.`

## **`The Role of Intelligence`**

`Most brands use AI as a headline.`

`Aissisted uses it as an engine.`

`Invisible.`  
 `Precise.`  
 `Constantly learning.`

`It doesn’t ask:`

`“What kind of person are you?”`

`It observes:`

`“How are you actually living?”`

`Then it adjusts.`

`Continuously.`

`Quietly.`

`Accurately.`

## 

## **`The Consumer, Reframed`**

`You are not targeting demographics.`

`You are targeting states of being:`

* `The overwhelmed high performer`  
* `The seeker trying to feel better`  
* `The optimizer chasing an edge`  
* `The believer in something deeper`  
* `The exhausted person who just wants clarity`

`They all share one thing:`

`They are done guessing.`

## **`The Experience Is the Product`**

`Aissisted is not a bottle.`

`It is a relationship.`

`From the moment someone engages:`

* `they are understood`  
* `they are guided`  
* `they are reflected back to themselves`

`The packaging becomes a signal:`

`Clean. Precise. Personal.`  
`Like it came from a lab built just for them.`

`Their name.`  
`Their formula.`  
`Their outcome.`

`Not mass produced.`

**`Produced for them.`**

## **`The System Advantage`**

`Every other brand sells products.`

`Aissisted builds intelligence.`

`While competitors ask:`

`“What are people buying?”`

`You will know:`

* `who they are`  
* `how they’re changing`  
* `what’s working`  
* `what isn’t`  
* `what comes next`

`This is not just personalization.`

`This is evolution at scale.`

## **`The Category We Are Creating`**

`Not supplements.`  
`Not wellness.`  
`Not biohacking.`

`Something new:`

**`Intelligent, Adaptive, Personalized Health`**

`Where:`

* `the formula is alive`  
* `the system is learning`  
* `the experience is yours`

## **`The Line That Everything Must Obey`**

`If we strip everything away, your brand must always answer one question:`

`Does this make the consumer feel like this was made for them?`

`If yes, it belongs.`  
`If not, it’s noise.`

# **`VISION & MISSION FOUNDATION`**

## **`(a) The Problem We’re Solving`**

`For decades, people have been told to take control of their health.`

`But no one gave them the tools to actually do it.`

`Instead, they were handed:`

* `shelves of identical bottles`  
* `vague promises`  
* `generalized advice`  
* `and routines built for everyone… which means built for no one`

`Health became a guessing game.`

`Take this.`  
`Try that.`  
`Hope it works.`

`And when it doesn’t?`

`Confusion turns into fatigue.`  
`Fatigue turns into abandonment.`

`Not because people don’t care about their health.`  
**`But because the system was never built for them.`**

## **`b) Why It Matters`**

`Because health is not a product category.`

`It is the foundation of everything.`

`How you think.`  
 `How you move.`  
 `How you show up.`  
 `How long you live.`  
 `How well you live.`

`And yet, the modern world has created a paradox:`

`We have more health information than ever before…`  
 `and less clarity than ever before.`

`People don’t need more options.`

`They need precision.`  
 `They need guidance.`  
 `They need something that actually understands them.`

`Because when health becomes clear…`

`Life opens.`

## 

## **`(c) The Values That Drive Us`**

`Not corporate values.`

`Operating beliefs.`

**`1. The Individual Over the Average`**  
 `No one should be treated like a statistical midpoint.`  
 `Your biology is not a segment. It’s a signature.`

**`2. Simplicity Is the Highest Form of Intelligence`**  
 `If it’s complicated, it won’t last.`  
 `If it doesn’t fit into life, it doesn’t belong in it.`

**`3. Science Must Be Felt, Not Just Proven`**  
 `Data matters. Outcomes matter more.`  
 `People don’t buy ingredients. They buy how they feel.`

**`4. Ownership Creates Transformation`**  
 `When someone co-creates their health, they commit to it.`  
 `“I built this” becomes “I live this.”`

**`5. Intelligence Should Empower, Not Replace`**  
 `AI is not the hero. The human is.`  
 `We exist to assist, not override.`

## 

## **`(d) What Makes Us Different`**

`Most companies sell supplements.`

`Some personalize them.`

`But personalization today is shallow.`

`A quiz.`  
`A recommendation.`  
`A static result.`

`Aissisted is something else entirely.`

`A system that learns, adapts, and evolves with you.`

* `It integrates your biology, behavior, and environment`  
* `It updates as your life changes`  
* `It refines continuously, not once`

`This is not personalization.`

`This is adaptive intelligence applied to human health.`

`And wrapped around it:`

* `design that feels like luxury`  
* `simplicity that feels effortless`  
* `and an experience that feels like it was made only for you` 

# **`VISION`**

**`To create a world where every person is understood at a biological level, and health is no longer a guessing game, but a precisely guided, deeply personal experience.`**

`Alternative (more elevated, slightly sharper):`

**`To redefine human health by making personalized, intelligent wellness the new global standard.`**

# **`MISSION`**

**`We harness artificial intelligence and bioscience to create adaptive, personalized nutrition that evolves with each individual—eliminating guesswork, simplifying health, and empowering people to live at their full potential.`**

`Alternative (more emotional, slightly more brand-forward):`

**`We exist to replace one-size-fits-all health with living, evolving systems that understand you—using intelligent science to deliver personalized nutrition that fits your life, your body, and your future.`**

# **`THE ONE-LINE DISTILLATION (YOUR TRUE NORTH)`**

`If everything had to collapse into one sentence:`

**`Personalized by intelligence. Owned by you.`**

# **`RALLY CRY & REASON TO BELIEVE`**

## **`First, the Truth`**

`Before we write anything, we anchor in one thing:`

`People are not looking for supplements.`

`They are looking for:`

* `control`  
* `clarity`  
* `energy`  
* `confidence`  
* `and proof that what they’re doing actually works`

`They want to feel like:`

`“I finally figured it out.”`

`Your rally cry must deliver that emotion instantly.`

---

# **`THE RALLY CRY`**

`Not a tagline.`  
`Not a slogan.`

**`A line that feels like a shift in identity.`**

`Something that, when someone reads it, they think:`

`“That’s exactly what I’ve been trying to do.”`

## **`Primary Rally Cry`** 

**`“Your Body. Understood.”`**

`Short.`  
`Sharp.`  
`Unignorable.`

`It reframes everything.`

`Not optimized.`  
`Not improved.`  
`Not enhanced.`

**`Understood.`**

`Because that’s what no one has ever given them.`

## **`Core Reason to Believe (Strategic Version)`**

`Aissisted combines real-time biological data, wearable insights, and advanced artificial intelligence to create continuously adapting supplement formulas—designed specifically for your body, your lifestyle, and how you actually live.`

## **`Brand Version (Consumer-Facing)`**

`Your body is constantly changing.`  
`Your supplements should too.`

`Aissisted analyzes your biomarkers, behavior, and daily patterns to create a formula that evolves with you—so what you take always matches what you need.`

## 

## **`Luxury + Differentiation Version`**

`No two formulas are the same.`  
`Because no two lives are the same.`

`Aissisted uses intelligent science to design a supplement system unique to you—continuously refined by your data, your habits, and your biology.`

## **`The “Unfair Advantage” Version`**

`While others personalize once, Aissisted personalizes continuously—integrating wearable data, lab results, and behavioral patterns to evolve your formula in real time.`

# 

# **`THE PROOF STACK (WHAT BUILDS TRUST)`**

`Your reason to believe is not one claim.`

`It’s a stack of reinforcing truths:`

### **`1. Data Integration`**

* `Wearables (WHOOP, Apple Watch, Oura)`  
* `Lab results`  
* `Behavioral inputs`

`→ This is not guesswork`

### **`2. Adaptive Intelligence`**

* `Continuous updates`  
* `Not static recommendations`

`→ This evolves with you`

### **`3. Superior Delivery`**

* `Nano-emulsion`  
* `Higher absorption`  
* `Simpler format`

`→ This actually works better`

### **`4. Personal Ownership`**

* `Named product`  
* `Designed experience`  
* `Co-creation`

`→ This is yours`

### **`5. System, Not Product`**

* `Subscription`  
* `Feedback loops`  
* `Ongoing refinement`

`→ This gets smarter over time`

`Together, this creates something powerful:`

`Not a supplement.`  
`A system that learns you.`

# 

# **`THE COMBINED MOMENT (HOW IT COMES TO LIFE)`**

`When someone encounters Aissisted, this is what they should feel:`

`They read:`

**`“Your Body. Understood.”`**

`And they think:`

`“Finally.”`

`Then they see:`

*`Powered by your data.`*  
*`Refined by intelligent science.`*  
*`Designed only for you.`*

`And they believe:`

`“This is different.”`

# **`THE FINAL TRUTH`**

`Your rally cry creates desire.`

`Your reason to believe removes doubt.`

`And when both are aligned…`

`You don’t have to convince people.`

`They convince themselves.`

# **Creative Brief**

# **`CREATIVE BRIEF`**

## **`The Product / Service`**

`Aissisted is an AI-powered, hyper-personalized supplement system that uses real-time biological data, wearable inputs, and intelligent science to create continuously evolving nutrition designed specifically for the individual.`

`Not a product.`  
`A living system.`

## **`1. Reason of Relief (The Problem We Solve)`**

`People are exhausted by their own health routines.`

`Too many pills.`  
`Too many opinions.`  
`Too much guesswork.`

`They’ve tried:`

* `buying supplements blindly`  
* `following trends`  
* `copying routines that work for someone else`

`And still…`

`They don’t know if any of it is actually working.`

`The real problem is not lack of effort.`  
`It’s lack of clarity.`

`Aissisted removes the burden of figuring it out.`

`It replaces confusion with precision.`  
`It replaces overload with simplicity.`  
`It replaces guessing with knowing.`

**`Relief is the moment someone realizes:`**  
**`“I don’t have to figure this out anymore.”`**

## **`2. Rally Cry (The Emotional Hook)`**

**`“Your Body. Understood.”`**

`This is the unifying idea.`

`It speaks to:`

* `frustration → finally solved`  
* `complexity → simplified`  
* `invisibility → recognition`

`It is not about optimization.`

`It is about being seen, accurately, for the first time.`

## **`3. Target Consumer (Who They Are)`**

`Not defined by age.`  
`Defined by mindset.`

### **`The Core Archetype: The Modern Optimizer`**

`They are:`

* `high-functioning but overwhelmed`  
* `informed but uncertain`  
* `disciplined but fatigued by inconsistency`

`They live in tension between:`

* `ambition and burnout`  
* `knowledge and confusion`  
* `effort and results`

### **`Primary Segments`**

**`1. Time-Starved Achievers`**  
 `Executives, founders, operators`  
 `They want performance, clarity, efficiency`  
 `They will pay for anything that removes friction`

**`2. The Quantified Self`**  
 `Wearables, data, tracking, optimization`  
 `They want deeper insights and better outputs`  
 `They are early adopters and evangelists`

**`3. Remedy Seekers`**  
 `Low energy, poor sleep, brain fog`  
 `They’ve tried everything`  
 `They want something that finally works`

**`4. Spiritual + Wellness Explorers`**  
 `Meditation, longevity, holistic living`  
 `They believe in alignment of mind and body`  
 `They want guidance, not just products`

### **`What They All Care About`**

* `Feeling better, not just doing more`  
* `Simplicity over complexity`  
* `Personal relevance over generic advice`  
* `Trust over marketing`  
* `Ownership over consumption`

`They don’t want supplements.`  
**`They want certainty`**`.`

## 

## **`4. Consumption Method (The Experience)`**

`This is not how they take it.`

`This is how they feel it.`

### **`The Journey`**

**`Step 1: Discovery`**  
 `They realize something different exists`  
 `Not another product, but a system`

**`Step 2: Understanding`**  
 `They input their data, connect their devices`  
 `They feel seen, not segmented`

**`Step 3: Creation`**  
 `Their formula is built`  
 `Not chosen`  
 `Not recommended`

**`Designed`**

**`Step 4: Delivery`**  
 `A product arrives with:`

* `their name`  
* `their formula`  
* `their intention`

`It feels like it was made for them`  
 `Because it was`

**`Step 5: Ritual`**  
 `They press, mix, consume`

`One action`  
 `No clutter`  
 `No confusion`

**`Step 6: Evolution`**  
 `The system adapts`  
 `Quietly`

`They feel:`

* `better energy`  
* `better sleep`  
* `better clarity`

`And more importantly:`

**`They trust it`**

## 

## **`5. Mandatories (What We Must Communicate)`**

`These are non-negotiable.`

`Every touchpoint must reinforce them.`

### **`1. Personalization is Real`**

`Not a quiz`  
`Not surface-level`

`→ Built from real data, biology, and behavior`

### **`2. This Evolves With You`**

`Not static`  
`Not fixed`

`→ Continuously adapting system`

### **`3. Simplicity is Core`**

`No pill overload`  
`No complex routines`

`→ One elegant, seamless experience`

### **`4. Intelligent Science`**

`AI + bioscience`

`→ Not hype, but real capability`

### **`5. Ownership`**

`This is theirs`

`→ Their name, their formula, their outcome`

### **`6. Premium Experience`**

`Everything feels elevated`

`→ Design, packaging, language, interaction`

## **`6. Guardrails (What We Must Avoid)`**

`These are equally important.`

`Because one wrong tone breaks the brand.`

### **`1. Do Not Feel Clinical`**

`Avoid:`

* `sterile language`  
* `hospital-like visuals`  
* `overly technical jargon`

`We are science made human, not science made cold.`

### **`2. Do Not Feel Generic`**

`Avoid:`

* `stock wellness clichés`  
* `“for everyone” messaging`  
* `broad, vague claims`

`Everything must feel specific and personal`

### **`3. Do Not Overpromise`**

`Avoid:`

* `miracle claims`  
* `cure language`  
* `exaggerated outcomes`

`We build trust through precision, not hype.`

### **`4. Do Not Lead With AI`**

`AI is the engine`  
 `Not the headline`

`→ The benefit is understanding, not technology`

### **`5. Do Not Overcomplicate`**

`Avoid:`

* `long explanations`  
* `layered instructions`  
* `cognitive overload`

`If it’s not simple, it’s wrong.`

### **`6. Do Not Lose Emotion`**

`This is not just optimization`

`→ It is empowerment, relief, and identity`

# **`THE FINAL LENS`**

`Every piece of creative, product, or messaging must pass this test:`

`Does this make the consumer feel understood?`

`If yes → it’s Aissisted`  
`If no → it’s noise`

# **`What This Unlocks`**

`With this brief, you now have:`

* `A clear emotional foundation`  
* `A defined audience`  
* `A mapped experience`  
* `A sharp set of rules for execution`

# **Brand Guide**

# **`BRAND GUIDE`**

## **`The Essence`**

`Aissisted does not shout.`

`It doesn’t try to convince.`  
`It doesn’t overwhelm.`

`It speaks the way truth feels when you finally understand something:`

`Calm. Clear. Certain.`

# **`1. BRAND PERSONALITY`**

`If Aissisted were a person, it would not be a doctor in a lab coat.`

`It would be:`

* `The advisor who understands you without needing long explanations`  
* `The friend who simplifies what feels complicated`  
* `The operator who removes friction from your life`  
* `The system that quietly makes everything work better`

### **`Core Traits`**

**`1. Intelligent, but never arrogant`**  
 `We know more, but we don’t show off.`

**`2. Sophisticated, but never distant`**  
 `We feel premium, but always human.`

**`3. Precise, but never rigid`**  
 `We are exact, but adaptable.`

**`4. Empowering, never controlling`**  
 `We guide. We don’t dictate.`

**`5. Minimal, but meaningful`**  
 `Every word earns its place.`

# **`2. VOICE PILLARS`**

`These are the rules behind how Aissisted communicates.`

## **`Pillar 1: CLARITY OVER COMPLEXITY`**

`We take what is complicated…`  
 `and make it feel obvious.`

`Not by dumbing it down.`  
 `But by refining it.`

**`Instead of:`**  
 `“Advanced AI-driven biomarker analysis for personalized supplementation”`

**`We say:`**

`“We learn your body. Then we build what it needs.”`

## **`Pillar 2: PERSONAL OVER GENERIC`**

`We never speak to “people.”`

**`We speak to you.`**

`Every message should feel like it was written for one person.`

**`Instead of:`**  
 `“Customers experience improved wellness outcomes”`

**`We say:`**

`“You feel better. You know why. And it finally makes sense.”`

## **`Pillar 3: BENEFIT OVER FEATURE`**

`We don’t sell ingredients.`  
 `We sell outcomes.`

`We don’t explain the system first.`  
 `We show what it does.`

**`Instead of:`**  
 `“Nano-emulsion delivery improves absorption”`

**`We say:`**

`“You absorb more. So you feel more.”`

## **`Pillar 4: EMOTION + INTELLIGENCE`**

`We live at the intersection of:`

* `logic (this works)`  
* `and feeling (this matters)`

`Never one without the other.`

**`Example:`**

`“Your formula adapts to your data.`  
 `So what you take always matches what you need.”`

## **`Pillar 5: SIMPLICITY IS LUXURY`**

`Luxury is not excess.`

`Luxury is effortless precision.`

`Every sentence should feel:`

* `shorter than expected`  
* `clearer than expected`  
* `stronger than expected`

# 

# **`3. TONE SYSTEM (HOW WE FLEX)`**

`Aissisted speaks differently depending on context…`  
`but always within the same DNA.`

## **`1. Core Brand Tone (Default)`**

`Calm. Clear. Assured.`

`“Your body changes.`  
 `Your formula should too.”`

## **`2. Inspirational Tone (Campaign / Hero)`**

`Elevated. Emotional. Expansive.`

`“For the first time, your health isn’t guesswork.`  
 `It’s understood.”`

## **`3. Functional Tone (Product / UX)`**

`Direct. Effortless. Simple.`

`“Press. Mix. Go.”`

## **`4. Credibility Tone (Science / Proof)`**

`Confident. Grounded. Transparent.`

`“Built from your data.`  
 `Refined by intelligent science.”`

## **`5. Conversational Tone (Email / CRM)`**

`Personal. Supportive. Human.`

`“We noticed your sleep has been off.`  
 `We’ve adjusted your formula to support it.”`

# **`4. LANGUAGE SYSTEM`**

`This is where consistency becomes identity.`

## **`Words We Own`**

`These words should appear often, repeatedly, intentionally:`

* `Yours`  
* `Built`  
* `Designed`  
* `Understood`  
* `Precision`  
* `Adaptive`  
* `Evolving`  
* `Simple`  
* `Clear`  
* `Intelligent`  
* `Effortless`

## **`Words We Avoid`**

`These break the brand instantly:`

* `“Customers”`  
* `“Users”`  
* `“Consumers”`  
* `“Revolutionary” (overhyped)`  
* `“Cutting-edge” (generic)`  
* `“Miracle”`  
* `“Cure”`  
* `Overly clinical terms without translation`

## **`Signature Phrases (Repeatable Assets)`**

`These become your verbal identity:`

* **`“Your Body. Understood.”`**  
* **`“Built for you.”`**  
* **`“Designed by your data.”`**  
* **`“Evolving with you.”`**  
* **`“Smarter science. Simpler health.”`**  
* **`“One system. Total clarity.”`**

# **`5. STRUCTURE OF GREAT AISSISTED COPY`**

`Every strong piece of communication should follow this rhythm:`

### **`1. Tension (The Problem)`**

`“You’ve tried everything.”`

### **`2. Truth (The Insight)`**

`“But none of it was built for you.”`

### **`3. Shift (The Idea)`**

`“So we changed that.”`

### **`4. Resolution (The Product)`**

`“A system that learns your body and builds what it needs.”`

### **`5. Ownership (The Close)`**

`“Your formula. Your outcome.”`

# **`6. VOICE IN ACTION (EXAMPLES)`**

## **`Website Hero`**

**`Your Body. Understood.`**

`Built from your data.`  
 `Designed for your life.`

`No guesswork. No overload.`  
 `Just what you need. When you need it.`

## **`Product Page`**

`This isn’t a supplement.`

`It’s your system.`

`One formula, continuously refined by your biology, your behavior, and your data.`

`So what you take always matches what you need.`

## **`Packaging Copy`**

`Designed for: Ron`

`Powered by intelligent science.`

`Built from your data.`

`Refined for your life.`

## **`Ad Copy`**

`You don’t need more supplements.`

`You need the right one.`

`Built for you.`

## **`Email`**

`Your recovery has been trending down.`

`We’ve adjusted your formula to support it.`

`You don’t have to think about it.`  
`We already did.`

# **`7. THE FINAL FILTER`**

`Before anything goes live, ask:`

* `Does this feel simple?`  
* `Does this feel personal?`  
* `Does this feel intelligent?`  
* `Does this feel premium?`  
* `Does this make someone feel understood?`

`If yes → it’s Aissisted`  
 `If not → rewrite it`

---

# **`WHAT YOU NOW HAVE`**

`You now control:`

* `how the brand speaks`  
* `how it flexes across channels`  
* `how it maintains consistency at scale`  
* `how it feels unmistakable`

# **Brand Architecture**

# **`BRAND ARCHITECTURE & MESSAGING HIERARCHY`**

## **`Brand Architecture`**

## **`THE CORE IDEA (NON-NEGOTIABLE FOUNDATION)`**

`Everything ladders up to one simple, undeniable shift:`

**`Luxury is no longer what you have.`**  
**`It’s how well you function.`**

`And the only way to achieve that…`

**`Is through personalization.`**

`So we define it clearly:`

**`Aissisted = Personalized Well-being, Powered by Intelligent Science`**

# **`PART 1: BRAND ARCHITECTURE (HOW WE SCALE)`**

`We are not building one brand voice.`

`We are building a three-layer system that expands reach without losing identity.`

`Think of it like a pyramid:`

## **`1. EVERYDAY EMPOWERMENT (THE CORE — MASS ADOPTION)`**

`This is where people enter.`

`Simple. Clear. Accessible.`

`This is the brand at its most human.`

### **`Role`**

`The gateway`  
 `The widest audience`  
 `The daily use case`

### **`Core Message`**

`Health should be simple.`  
`And it should be yours.`

### **`Translation`**

* `Remove friction`  
* `Remove confusion`  
* `Make it effortless`

### **`Tone`**

* `Clear`  
* `Supportive`  
* `Reassuring`

### **`Example`**

`“No more guesswork.`  
 `Just what your body needs.”`

### **`Who It Reaches`**

* `Busy professionals`  
* `People overwhelmed by supplements`  
* `First-time adopters`

## **`2. SCIENCE & TRUST (THE PROOF — CREDIBILITY LAYER)`**

`This is where belief is built.`

`This is what removes skepticism.`

### **`Role`**

`Validation`  
`Authority`  
`Trust engine`

### **`Core Message`**

`This works because it’s built on real data.`

### **`Translation`**

* `AI + biomarkers + wearables`  
* `Adaptive, not static`  
* `Precision, not approximation`

### **`Tone`**

* `Confident`  
* `Grounded`  
* `Transparent`

### **`Example`**

`“Your formula adapts to your data—so what you take always matches what you need.”`

### **`Who It Reaches`**

* `Biohackers`  
* `Health skeptics`  
* `Medical-minded consumers`  
* `Partners and physicians`

## **`3. LUXURY WELLNESS (THE HALO — ASPIRATION)`**

`This is where the brand becomes desirable.`

`Not functional.`

**`Coveted.`**

### **`Role`**

`Identity`  
`Status`  
`Emotional pull`

### **`Core Message`**

`The most valuable thing in the world is a body that works at its best.`

### **`Translation`**

* `Personalization = exclusivity`  
* `Your formula = yours alone`  
* `Well-being = status`

### **`Tone`**

* `Elevated`  
* `Minimal`  
* `Confident`

### **`Example`**

`“The new luxury is how you feel.”`

### **`Who It Reaches`**

* `High performers`  
* `Early adopters`  
* `Premium consumers`  
* `Culture drivers`

## **`HOW THE SYSTEM WORKS TOGETHER`**

`This is critical.`

`We are not choosing one lane.`

`We are owning all three.`

* **`Everyday Empowerment → brings people in`**  
* **`Science & Trust → makes them stay`**  
* **`Luxury Wellness → makes them want it`**

### 

### **`In one sentence:`**

`We attract with simplicity.`  
`We prove with science.`  
`We elevate with identity.`

# **`PART 2: MESSAGING HIERARCHY (WHAT WE SAY, AND WHEN)`**

`This is where most brands fail.`

`They say everything at once.`

`We don’t.`

`We guide the conversation.`

## **`LEVEL 1: THE HOOK (EMOTION FIRST)`**

`This is the first thing people see.`

`It must stop them.`

### **`Goal`**

`Create immediate recognition`

### **`Message`**

**`“Your Body. Understood.”`**

`Alternative:`

`“Health, Without the Guesswork.”`

### **`What It Does`**

* `Speaks to frustration`  
* `Signals something new`  
* `Feels personal instantly`

## **`LEVEL 2: THE SHIFT (THE IDEA)`**

`Now we explain the difference.`

`Not how it works.`

`Why it matters.`

### **`Goal`**

`Reframe the category`

### **`Message`**

`“Most supplements are built for everyone.`  
 `Yours is built for you.”`

### **`What It Does`**

* `Breaks old model`  
* `Introduces personalization`  
* `Creates contrast`

## 

## **`LEVEL 3: THE SYSTEM (HOW IT WORKS)`**

`Now we introduce intelligence.`

`But simply.`

### **`Goal`**

`Build understanding`

### **`Message`**

`“We use your data, behavior, and biology to create a formula that evolves with you.”`

### **`What It Does`**

* `Introduces AI`  
* `Signals adaptability`  
* `Builds intrigue`

## **`LEVEL 4: THE PROOF (WHY IT’S REAL)`**

`Now we validate.`

### **`Goal`**

`Remove doubt`

### **`Message`**

`“Powered by wearable data, biometrics, and intelligent science—your formula adjusts as your life changes.”`

### **`What It Does`**

* `Adds credibility`  
* `Reinforces uniqueness`  
* `Builds trust`

## **`LEVEL 5: THE OUTCOME (WHAT THEY GET)`**

`Now we bring it back to them.`

### **`Goal`**

`Make it tangible`

### **`Message`**

`“Better energy. Better clarity. Better recovery.`  
 `Because what you take finally matches what you need.”`

### **`What It Does`**

* `Connects to benefits`  
* `Feels real`  
* `Feels achievable`

## **`LEVEL 6: THE OWNERSHIP (THE CLOSE)`**

`This is where the brand wins.`

### **`Goal`**

`Create identity + conversion`

### **`Message`**

`“Your formula. Your system. Your edge.”`

### **`What It Does`**

* `Creates emotional lock-in`  
* `Reinforces personalization`  
* `Drives action`

# **`THE FULL FLOW (EXAMPLE IN SEQUENCE)`**

`This is how it should feel in the real world:`

**`Your Body. Understood.`**

`Most supplements are built for everyone.`  
`Yours is built for you.`

`Aissisted uses your data, behavior, and biology`  
`to create a formula that evolves with you.`

`Powered by intelligent science,`  
 `your system adapts as your life changes.`

`So what you take finally matches what you need.`

**`Your formula. Your edge.`**

# **`THE STRATEGIC ADVANTAGE YOU NOW HAVE`**

`You now control:`

* **`How the brand scales`** `(architecture)`  
* **`How the brand communicates`** `(hierarchy)`  
* **`How the brand converts`** `(flow)`

`And most importantly:`

`You are anchored in a truth that is extremely hard to compete with:`

**`If luxury = personalized well-being…`**  
**`then Aissisted defines luxury.`**

# **Visual Design**

`VISUAL IDENTITY & DESIGN SYSTEM`

## **`THE CORE VISUAL IDEA`**

**`Precision made effortless.`**  
**`Science made beautiful.`**  
**`Personalization made visible.`**

`Aissisted should look like:`

* `it came from the future`  
* `but belongs in your life today`  
* `and was made only for you`

# 

# **`1. VISUAL PHILOSOPHY`**

`Most supplement brands choose one lane:`

* `clinical → cold, sterile`  
* `lifestyle → soft, vague`  
* `luxury → distant, ornamental`

`Aissisted does something different:`

**`We merge science, simplicity, and identity into one visual language.`**

### **`The Balance`**

* **`Science → credibility`**  
* **`Simplicity → usability`**  
* **`Luxury → desirability`**  
* **`Personalization → ownership`**

### **`The Rule`**

`If it doesn’t feel precise, it doesn’t belong.`  
`If it doesn’t feel simple, it doesn’t survive.`  
`If it doesn’t feel personal, it isn’t Aissisted.`

# 

# **`2. COLOR SYSTEM`**

`Our colors are not decoration.`  
`They are signals.`

**`Not cold intelligence.`**  
**`Living intelligence.`**

`Red becomes the signal of:`

* `blood`  
* `vitality`  
* `internal systems`  
* `life in motion`

`But always controlled.`  
`Always precise.`  
`Always elevated.`

# **`1. CORE COLOR PALETTE`** 

## **`Primary Color: Medical Red`**

`This is confident red.`  
`Saturated red.`  
`Unmistakable red.`

`This is:`

**`Assertive. Controlled. Oxygen-rich red.`**

`Think:`

* `arterial blood`  
* `surgical precision`  
* `biological truth`

### **`Color Direction`**

* `Slightly desaturated`  
* `Slightly darkened`  
* `Matte, never glossy`

### **`What It Signals`**

* `Life`  
* `Internal function`  
* `Realness`  
* `Biological relevance`

## **`Supporting Core Colors`** 

### **`Pure White`**

`→ Cleanroom`  
`→ Clarity`  
`→ Absence of noise`

### **`Graphite / Soft Black`**

`→ Structure`  
`→ Sophistication`  
`→ Balance to red`

## **`Accent Colors`** 

### **`Midnight Blue (Keep)`**

`→ Intelligence layer`  
`→ Data / system signal`

`This becomes more important now`  
`because it balances the warmth of red with cool precision`

# **`2. COLOR PHILOSOPHY`** 

`Previously:`

`Intelligence → blue`

`Now:`

**`Biology → red`**  
**`Intelligence → Midnight Blue`**

### **`The New Balance`**

* `Red = the body`  
* `Aqua = the intelligence; data visualization`   
* `White = the system; clarity, precision, and organization.`

### **`The Meaning`**

`The body generates the signal.`  
`The intelligence interprets it.`  
`Aissisted connects both.`

# 

# **`3. PACKAGING SYSTEM (RED EXECUTION)`**

`This is where the change becomes iconic.`

## **`The Cap (Hero Element — Updated)`**

### **`Now: Matte Medical Red Cap`**

* `Matte red finish (#EE2B37)`  
* `Soft, non-reflective surface`  
* `Precision-milled feel`

### **`Details`**

* `Subtle graphite ring`  
* `Aqua activation line (critical contrast)`

### **`Why This Works`**

`The red makes it:`

* `visceral`  
* `biological`  
* `different from anything in the category`

`The aqua keeps it:`

* `intelligent`  
* `controlled`  
* `modern`

## **`The Bottle (Keep Clean)`**

* `Frosted white`  
* `Minimalist`  
* `Almost clinical`

### **`Why This Matters`**

`The bottle must neutralize the intensity of red`

`→ Keeps the system balanced`  
`→ Prevents visual overload`

## **`Core Palette (Foundation)`**

### **`Midnight Blue`**

`Deep. Intelligent. Controlled.`  
`→ The color of trust and intelligence`

### **`Pure White`**

`Clean. Open. Minimal.`  
`→ The absence of noise`

### **`Graphite Gray`**

`Grounded. Sophisticated. Structural.`  
`→ The backbone`

## **`Accent Palette (Energy + Personalization)`**

### **`Midnight Blue`**

`→ Intelligence in motion`  
`→ Data becoming action`

### **`Matted Red`**

`→ Health, vitality, balance`

### **`Graphite Gray`**

`→ The signal of luxury`  
`→ Used sparingly, never loudly`

## **`Color Philosophy`**

* `Core colors = system`  
* `Accent colors = personalization`

`The base is consistent.`  
`The accents shift—just like the user.`

# **`3. TYPOGRAPHY SYSTEM`**

`Typography is where science meets luxury.`

## **`Primary Font: Briston`**

`Modern. Minimal. Controlled.`

`→ Used for headlines`  
`→ Feels engineered, intentional`

## **`Secondary Font: Baskerville`**

`Elegant. Human. Timeless.`

`→ Used for subtext and moments of emotion`  
`→ Introduces warmth into precision`

## **`Secondary Font: Source Code Pro`**

`Structured. Intelligent. Systematic.`

`→ Used for:`

* `Data moments`  
* `Personalization outputs`  
* `Ingredient breakdowns`  
* `AI-driven insights`  
* `UI components (dashboards, metrics, biomarker outputs)`

## **`Type Behavior`**

* `Large, confident headlines`  
* `Generous spacing`  
* `No clutter`  
* `Words feel placed, not filled`

### **`Example`**

**`Your Body. Understood.`**  
 `(set in Briston)`

`Built from your data. Designed for your life.`  
 `(set in Source Code Pro)`

# 

# **`4. IMAGERY SYSTEM`**

`This is where most brands get it wrong.`

`We do not show “fitness.”`  
`We do not show “supplements.”`

`We show states of being.`

## **`Visual Themes`**

### **`1. The Individual`**

`Single person. Never crowds.`  
`→ This is about you, not people`

### **`2. The Moment`**

* `drinking water`  
* `early morning light`  
* `post-workout calm`  
* `deep focus`

`→ Not performance.`  
`→ Presence.`

### **`3. The Material World`**

* `glass`  
* `liquid`  
* `light`  
* `reflections`

`→ Feels scientific, but elevated`

### **`4. The Data Layer (Subtle)`**

* `soft gradients`  
* `dot matrices`  
* `flowing patterns`

`→ Represents intelligence without overwhelming`

## **`What We Avoid`**

* `stock fitness imagery`  
* `pills spilling out of bottles`  
* `lab coats and microscopes`  
* `overly staged “wellness” scenes`

# **`5. DESIGN LANGUAGE`**

`This is the system that connects everything.`

## **`Shapes`**

* `clean geometry`  
* `circles, lines, flows`  
* `no chaos`

`→ Represents control + intelligence`

## **`Motion (Digital)`**

* `slow, intentional transitions`  
* `gradients that move like liquid`  
* `subtle responsiveness`

`→ Feels alive, but calm`

## **`Texture`**

* `matte surfaces`  
* `soft reflections`  
* `minimal gloss`

`→ Premium without flash`

# 

# **`6. PACKAGING SYSTEM (ICONIC MOMENT)`**

`This is your most important physical asset.`

`This is where the brand becomes real.`

## **`The Core Idea`**

**`A product that looks like it was made in a cleanroom…`**  
**`but labeled like it was made for you.`**

## **`The Cap (Hero Element)`**

* `Midnight blue matte finish`  
* `Subtle silver ring`  
* `Midnight Blue activation line`

`When pressed:`

`→ visual feedback`  
`→ a moment of interaction`  
`→ a ritual begins`

## **`The Bottle`**

* `Frosted white or translucent`  
* `Minimalist label`  
* `Clean, almost clinical—but warm`

## **`The Label (Where Personalization Lives)`**

`Front:`

`AISSISTED`

`Designed for: [First Name]`

`Your Body. Understood.`

`Back:`

`Built from your data`  
`Refined by intelligent science`

`One system. Total clarity.`

## **`The Feeling`**

`When someone holds it, they should think:`

`“This wasn’t made for a market.`  
 `This was made for me.”`

# **`7. DIGITAL EXPERIENCE (UI / UX)`**

`Our product is physical.`  
`But our system is digital.`

## **`The Interface Should Feel Like:`**

* `Apple-level simplicity`  
* `Lemonade.com's easy, clean, and actionable interface`  
* `Whoop interactive data clarity`  
* `Health app intelligence`

## 

## **`Key Principles`**

### **`1. Show, Don’t Tell`**

* `trends`  
* `changes`  
* `insights`

`→ visual first, text second`

### 

### **`2. Personal at Every Touchpoint`**

* `name`  
* `data`  
* `feedback`

`→ constant reflection of self`

### **`3. Reduce Decision Fatigue`**

* `no overwhelming choices`  
* `guided actions`

### **`4. Feedback Loop`**

`“We adjusted your formula.”`

`This is the magic.`

# 

# **`8. THE ICONIC MOMENT`**

`Every great brand has one.`

`For Aissisted, it is:`

**`The Press`**

`The moment the user:`

* `presses the cap`  
* `activates their formula`  
* `watches it mix`

`That is our Nike swoosh.`  
`That is our Apple unboxing.`

`That is the ritual.`

# **`9. THE FINAL VISUAL TRUTH`**

`Aissisted should always feel like:`

* **`Apple`** `→ simplicity`  
* **`Nike`** `→ empowerment`  
* **`Aesop`** `→ premium design`  
* **`Whoop`** `→ quantified slef`

`But ultimately…`

**`Like something that belongs only to you.`**

# **Goto Market Plan**

# **`GO-TO-MARKET LAUNCH STRATEGY`**

## **`THE CORE LAUNCH IDEA`**

**`People don’t realize how misunderstood their body is… until they see what it looks like to be understood.`**

`So we don’t start by selling.`

`We start by revealing a truth.`

# **`THE CAMPAIGN NAME`**

## **`“UNDERSTOOD.”`**

`Simple.`  
`Ownable.`  
`Expandable.`

### **`Why It Works`**

* `It connects directly to your rally cry`  
* `It reframes the problem instantly`  
* `It feels human, not technical`  
* `It scales across every touchpoint`

### **`Campaign Line`**

**`“Most of your health has been guesswork.`**  
 **`This is what it looks like when it’s understood.”`**

# 

# **`CAMPAIGN STRUCTURE`**

`We build this in three phases:`

# **`PHASE 1 — TENSION (AWARENESS)`**

### ***`“You’ve been guessing.”`***

`Goal:`  
`Make people feel the problem.`

## **`Hero Message`**

`“You’ve been taking supplements for years.`  
 `Do you actually know if they’re working?”`

## **`Ad Concepts`**

### **`1. The Cabinet`**

`Visual:`  
`Bathroom cabinet overflowing with bottles`

`Copy:`

`“Five bottles. Ten ingredients. Zero clarity.”`

### **`2. The Routine`**

`Visual:`  
`Someone taking pills mindlessly`

`Copy:`

`“Routine doesn’t equal results.”`

### 

### 

### **`3. The Data Disconnect`**

`Visual:`  
`WHOOP / Apple Watch data screens`

`Copy:`

`“Your body is talking.`  
 `Nothing you take is listening.”`

## **`Objective`**

`Create discomfort.`  
`Create recognition.`

`“This is me.”`

# **`PHASE 2 — REVELATION (CONSIDERATION)`**

### ***`“There’s a better way.”`***

`Goal:`  
`Introduce Aissisted as the shift.`

## **`Hero Message`**

**`“Your Body. Understood.”`**

## **`Ad Concepts`**

### **`1. The Contrast`**

`Split screen:`

`LEFT:`

* `pills`  
* `confusion`  
* `clutter`

`RIGHT:`

* `Aissisted bottle`  
* `clean`  
* `minimal`

`Copy:`

`“Built for everyone…`  
 `or built for you.”`

### **`2. The System`**

`Visual:`

* `data flowing into a single formula`

`Copy:`

`“Your data becomes your dose.”`

### **`3. The Evolution`**

`Visual:`

* `changing metrics → changing formula`

`Copy:`

`“Your body changes.`  
 `Your supplements should too.”`

## **`Objective`**

`Shift belief.`

`“This is different.”`

# 

# **`PHASE 3 — OWNERSHIP (CONVERSION)`**

### ***`“This is mine.”`***

`Goal:`  
`Drive action and emotional lock-in.`

## **`Hero Message`**

`“Designed for: You.”`

## **`Ad Concepts`**

### **`1. The Name`**

`Visual:`

* `bottle labeled with their name`

`Copy:`

`“No one else gets this formula.”`

### **`2. The Ritual`**

`Visual:`

* `pressing the matted red cap`  
* `Midnight blue activation`

`Copy:`

`“One press. Total clarity.”`

### **`3. The Outcome`**

`Visual:`

* `calm focus, energy, recovery`

`Copy:`

`“You feel the difference.`  
 `Because it was built for you.”`

## **`Objective`**

`Create identity.`

`“I want this.”`

# **`LANDING PAGE STRUCTURE`**

`This must follow your messaging hierarchy perfectly.`

## **`1. HERO (HOOK)`**

**`Your Body. Understood.`**

`No more guesswork.`  
`Just what your body needs.`

## **`2. THE PROBLEM`**

`You’ve been trying to figure it out.`  
`Supplements. Routines. Advice.`

`But none of it was built for you.`

## **`3. THE SHIFT`**

`So we changed that.`

`A system that learns your body`  
`and builds what it needs.`

## **`4. HOW IT WORKS`**

* `Connect your data`  
* `Understand your biology`  
* `Receive your formula`  
* `Watch it evolve`

## **`5. PROOF`**

`Powered by wearable data, biometrics, and intelligent science.`

## **`6. PRODUCT MOMENT`**

`Visual:`

* `red cap`  
* `press moment`

## **`7. OUTCOME`**

* `better energy`  
* `better sleep`  
* `better clarity`

## **`8. OWNERSHIP CLOSE`**

**`Your formula. Your system. Your edge.`**

`CTA:`

`Get Started`

# **`CHANNEL STRATEGY`**

## **`1. PERFORMANCE (FAST SCALE)`**

* `Meta (IG + FB)`  
* `TikTok`  
* `YouTube Shorts`

`Focus:`

* `problem recognition`  
* `quick emotional hooks`

## **`2. INFLUENCER (TRUST ENGINE)`**

`Target:`

* `biohackers`  
* `fitness creators`  
* `high-performance entrepreneurs`  
* `wellness voices`

`Content:`

`“I tracked everything.`  
 `This is the first thing that actually adapted to me.”`

## **`3. CONTENT (LONG-TERM MOAT)`**

* `educational breakdowns`  
* `“what you’re missing”`  
* `data-driven storytelling`

## 

## **`4. PARTNERSHIPS`**

* `WHOOP`  
* `Oura`  
* `Apple Health ecosystem`

# 

# **`FIRST 90 DAYS PLAN`**

## **`MONTH 1 — PROBLEM DOMINANCE`**

* `push “you’ve been guessing” narrative`  
* `high-volume ads`  
* `social proof`

## **`MONTH 2 — SYSTEM EDUCATION`**

* `explain differentiation`  
* `influencer onboarding`  
* `deeper content`

## **`MONTH 3 — OWNERSHIP + SCALE`**

* `UGC`  
* `testimonials`  
* `personalization moments`

# **`THE VIRAL LOOP (IMPORTANT)`**

`This brand has built-in virality.`

## **`Trigger Moments`**

* `seeing your name on the product`  
* `showing your custom formula`  
* `sharing “what changed”`

## **`User Thought`**

`“This is mine.`  
 `No one else has this.”`

`That drives:`

* `sharing`  
* `identity`  
* `organic growth`

# 

# **`THE FINAL STRATEGIC EDGE`**

`You are not launching:`

* `supplements`  
* `personalization`  
* `AI`

# **VISUAL STYLE GUIDE**

# **`AISSISTED — LOCKED VISUAL STYLE GUIDE (v1.1)`**

**`Purpose:`** `This document defines exact rules for design execution.`  
**`No deviations. No reinterpretation. No “creative liberties.”`**

**Changelog:**
- **v1.1 (2026-04-17)** — Primary red updated from `#8A0F1A` (deep oxblood) to `#EE2B37` (confident saturated medical red). The "never bright red" rule is retired; the brand now leads with a more assertive red while preserving matte finish in physical execution and controlled application digitally.
- **v1.0** — Initial locked visual style guide.

`Reference foundation:`

# **`1. LOGO SYSTEM (NON-NEGOTIABLE)`**

White logo

## **`Red Logo![][image1]`**

![][image2]

Black Logo

## **`![][image3]`**

## 

## 

## 

## **`Primary Logo`**

* **`Font:`** `Briston Bold`  
* **`Case:`** `All lowercase → aissisted`  
* **`Special Character:`**  
  * `The “t” includes an accent (custom glyph treatment)`  
* **`Tracking:`** `Tight, slightly condensed`  
* **`Weight:`** `Bold only (no light, no regular)`

## **`Usage Rules`**

* `Always use the provided official logo file`  
* **`DO NOT:`**  
  * `Recreate the logo`  
  * `Substitute fonts`  
  * `Adjust kerning manually`  
  * `Add effects (shadow, glow, gradients)`  
  * `Stretch or distort`

## **`Color Applications`**

* `Default: White logo on dark background`  
* `Alternate: Graphite logo on white background`  
* `Red background: White logo only`

# **`2. COLOR SYSTEM (LOCKED HEX CODES)`**

`This is where most designers will drift. Do not allow that.`

## **`PRIMARY COLOR — MEDICAL RED`**

* **`Hex:`** `#EE2B37`  
* **`RGB:`** `238, 43, 55`  
* **`Usage:`**  
  * `Cap`  
  * `Key CTA accents`  
  * `Identity moments`

**`Rules:`**

* `Matte finish only in physical execution (cap, packaging)`  
* `Never gradient red`  
* `Never tinted or shaded — use exactly #EE2B37 for primary; hover state #CA252F only`

## **`CORE NEUTRALS`**

### **`Pure White`**

* `#FFFFFF`  
* `Backgrounds, system clarity`

### **`Graphite Black`**

* `#1C1C1E`  
* `Typography, structure`

### **`Soft Graphite`**

* `#2E2E2E`  
* `Secondary text`

## **`INTELLIGENCE LAYER (DATA COLOR)`**

### **`Midnight Blue`**

* `#0B1D3A`

`Used for:`

* `Data`  
* `System UI`  
* `Intelligence signaling`

## **`ACCENT — ACTIVATION COLOR`**

### **`Aqua Signal`**

* `#00C2D1`

`Used for:`

* `Activation line on cap`  
* `Data visualization`  
* `Feedback states`

## **`COLOR RULE SYSTEM`**

* `70% White`  
* `20% Graphite / Black`  
* `8% Red`  
* `2% Aqua`

**`If this ratio is violated → design is rejected`**

# 

# **`3. TYPOGRAPHY SYSTEM (STRICT)`**

## **`Primary Typeface — BRAND`**

### **`Briston Bold`**

* `Headlines ONLY`  
* `Logo ONLY`

## **`Secondary Typeface — SYSTEM / DIGITAL`**

### **`Source Code Pro`**

* `ALL UI`  
* `ALL data outputs`  
* `ALL dashboards`  
* `ALL personalization elements`

**`This is critical to your positioning.`**  
`It creates the “AI / system / precision” feel.`

## **`Tertiary Typeface — HUMAN LAYER`**

### **`Baskerville`**

* `Used sparingly`  
* `Emotional lines only`  
* `Never used in UI`

## **`Hierarchy Example`**

**`Headline (Briston Bold)`**  
`Your Body. Understood.`

**`System Line (Source Code Pro)`**  
 `Built from your data. Designed for your life.`

**`Emotional Accent (Baskerville)`**  
 `A system that evolves with you.`

## **`Typography Rules`**

* `Large headlines`  
* `Wide spacing`  
* `Minimal text blocks`  
* `Never dense paragraphs in design`

# **`4. TILE SYSTEM (MD TILE FRAMEWORK)`**

`This is how Claude and Figma should structure layouts.`

## **`Tile Behavior`**

`Each tile represents:`

* `A single idea`  
* `A single function`  
* `A single message`

## **`Tile Structure`**

### **`Tile Components`**

1. `Title (Briston)`  
2. `Data / explanation (Source Code Pro)`  
3. `Optional accent line (Aqua or Red)`

## **`Tile Types`**

### **`1. SYSTEM TILE`**

* `White background`  
* `Black text`  
* `Data-heavy`

### **`2. DATA TILE`**

* `Midnight blue background`  
* `White text`  
* `Aqua highlights`

### **`3. ACTION TILE`**

* `Red accent`  
* `Minimal text`  
* `CTA driven`

## **`Spacing Rules`**

* `Large margins`  
* `No clutter`  
* `Grid alignment only`

# **`5. LOGO + TILE INTEGRATION RULE`**

* `Logo must never compete with tiles`  
* `Logo sits:`  
  * `Top left OR`  
  * `Centered in hero only`  
* `Never repeated excessively`

# 

# **`6. PACKAGING DESIGN RULES`**

## **`Cap (Hero Object)`**

* `Color: #EE2B37 (Medical Red)`  
* `Finish: Soft-touch matte`  
* `Accent:`  
  * `Graphite ring`  
  * `Aqua activation line`

## **`Bottle`**

* `Frosted white`  
* `No heavy branding`  
* `Minimal label`

## **`Label Structure`**

**`Front:`**

`aissisted`  
`Designed for: [Name]`  
`Your Body. Understood.`

`aissisted`  
`Designed for: [Name]`  
`Your Body. Understood.`

# 

# **`7. UI / UX DESIGN RULES`**

`Claude + Figma MUST follow this:`

## **`Interface Behavior`**

* `Feels like:`  
  * `Apple Health`  
  * `WHOOP`  
  * `Bloomberg Terminal (clean version)`

## **`UI Rules`**

* `White-first interface`  
* `Data in Source Code Pro`  
* `Minimal colors`  
* `No decorative UI`

## **`Interaction Philosophy`**

* `Show → don’t explain`  
* `Reduce decisions`  
* `Always reflect the user`


# **`8. IMAGE & VISUAL RULES`**

## **`Allowed`**

* `Single subject`  
* `Natural light`  
* `Minimal environment`  
* `Glass / liquid / reflection`

## **`Not Allowed`**

* `Stock fitness`  
* `Pills`  
* `Lab coats`  
* `Over-staged wellness`

# **`9. MASTER DESIGN FILTER`**

`Every design must pass:`

* `Does it feel precise?`  
* `Does it feel simple?`  
* `Does it feel personal?`

`If not → it is rejected.`

# 

# **`10. CLAUDE + FIGMA EXECUTION PROMPT (COPY/PASTE)`**

`Use this exactly:`

**`SYSTEM PROMPT:`**

`Design strictly within the AISSISTED style guide.`

`Do not introduce new colors, fonts, or layouts.`

`Follow these constraints:`

* `Use ONLY:`  
  * `Briston Bold (headlines/logo)`  
  * `Source Code Pro (system/UI)`  
  * `Baskerville (minimal emotional accents)`  
* `Use exact hex codes:`  
  * `Red: #EE2B37`  
  * `White: #FFFFFF`  
  * `Graphite: #1C1C1E / #2E2E2E`  
  * `Midnight Blue: #0B1D3A`  
  * `Aqua: #00C2D1`  
* `Maintain strict tile-based layout system`  
* `Preserve white space`  
* `Do not add decorative elements`  
* `Do not reinterpret the logo`  
* `Always use the official provided logo file`

`Design must feel:`

* `precise`  
* `minimal`  
* `system-driven`  
* `personal`

`If a design choice is uncertain, default to less, not more`
